name: stadium_fanfare
description: Upbeat, brassy sports fanfare for stadium introductions and pre-game announcements. Energetic, triumphant, crowd-rousing.
trigger_hints: Play during character introductions, pre-race announcements, or victory ceremonies.

sources.title: Sports Rock Energetic Action
sources.author: SoundGalleryByDmitryTaras
sources.notes: Energetic rock with brass elements. Duration ~2:20. Perfect for sports introductions.
